---
title: "The Rev. Geoffrey Yonge"
---

## The Rev. Geoffrey Yonge

**Dates:** (20 Sept 1867-24 Dec 1893)

### Description

cousin and godson of CMY

### Biography

Son of the Rev. Duke Yonge of Puslinch and Charlotte Pode, when he died he was in deacon’s orders only, [<i>Win Coll Reg</i>, LG 1952]

### Letters

- Letter from [December 1893]
- Letter from July 28th [1893?]
- Letter from Sept 28th 1885

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
